metadata.name: qualtrics__contact
metadata.comment: Detailed view of all contacts (from both the XM Directory and Research Core contact endpoints), ehanced with response and mailing list metrics.

contact_id.name: contact_id
contact_id.comment: The ID for the contact. Example - CID_012345678901234

is_xm_directory_contact.name: is_xm_directory_contact
is_xm_directory_contact.comment: Boolean representing whether the contact came from the XM Directory API endpoint (ie stored in the `directory_contact` table).

is_research_core_contact.name: is_research_core_contact
is_research_core_contact.comment: Boolean representing whether the contact came from the (to-be-deprecated) Research Core API endpoint (ie stored in the `core_contact` table).

directory_id.name: directory_id
directory_id.comment: The directory ID, also known as a pool ID. Example - POOL_012345678901234

email_domain.name: email_domain
email_domain.comment: Domain of the contact's email address.

external_data_reference.name: external_data_reference
external_data_reference.comment: The external reference for the contact.

is_unsubscribed_from_directory.name: is_unsubscribed_from_directory
is_unsubscribed_from_directory.comment: Boolean indicating whether the contact unsubscribed from all contact from the Directory.

unsubscribed_from_directory_at.name: unsubscribed_from_directory_at
unsubscribed_from_directory_at.comment: Date and time the user opted out of the directory.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The point in time when the record was last modified.

mailing_list_ids.name: mailing_list_ids
mailing_list_ids.comment: Comma-separated list of mailing list IDs the record is associated with.

count_mailing_lists_subscribed_to.name: count_mailing_lists_subscribed_to
count_mailing_lists_subscribed_to.comment: Count of distinct mailing lists the contact is a member of and has not opted out of.

count_mailing_lists_unsubscribed_from.name: count_mailing_lists_unsubscribed_from
count_mailing_lists_unsubscribed_from.comment: Count of distinct mailing lists that the contact has opted out of receiving emails through.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The creation date and time of the record, expressed as an ISO 8601 value.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The schema or database this record came from if you are making use of the qualtrics_union_schemas or qualtrics_union_databases variables, respectively. Empty string if you are not using either of these variables to union together multiple Qualtrics connectors.

count_surveys_sent_email.name: count_surveys_sent_email
count_surveys_sent_email.comment: Distinct surveys sent to the contact via email invite.

count_surveys_sent_sms.name: count_surveys_sent_sms
count_surveys_sent_sms.comment: Distinct surveys sent to the contact via SMS invite.

count_surveys_opened_email.name: count_surveys_opened_email
count_surveys_opened_email.comment: Distinct surveys opened by the contact via email invite.

count_surveys_opened_sms.name: count_surveys_opened_sms
count_surveys_opened_sms.comment: Distinct surveys opened by the contact via SMS invite.

count_surveys_started_email.name: count_surveys_started_email
count_surveys_started_email.comment: Distinct surveys started by the contact via email invite.

count_surveys_started_sms.name: count_surveys_started_sms
count_surveys_started_sms.comment: Distinct surveys started by the contact via SMS invite.

count_surveys_completed_email.name: count_surveys_completed_email
count_surveys_completed_email.comment: Distinct surveys completed by the contact via email invite.

count_surveys_completed_sms.name: count_surveys_completed_sms
count_surveys_completed_sms.comment: Distinct surveys completed by the contact via SMS invite.

avg_survey_progress_pct.name: avg_survey_progress_pct
avg_survey_progress_pct.comment: On average, how far a respondent has progressed through a survey as a percentage out of 100.

avg_survey_duration_in_seconds.name: avg_survey_duration_in_seconds
avg_survey_duration_in_seconds.comment: On average, how long it took a respondent to finish a survey in seconds.

median_survey_progress_pct.name: median_survey_progress_pct
median_survey_progress_pct.comment: The median of how far a respondent has progressed through a survey as a percentage out of 100.

median_survey_duration_in_seconds.name: median_survey_duration_in_seconds
median_survey_duration_in_seconds.comment: The median of how long it took a respondent to finish a survey in seconds.

last_survey_response_recorded_at.name: last_survey_response_recorded_at
last_survey_response_recorded_at.comment: The most recent point in time when a survey response was recorded.

first_survey_response_recorded_at.name: first_survey_response_recorded_at
first_survey_response_recorded_at.comment: The earliest point in time when a survey response was recorded.

is_in_default_directory.name: is_in_default_directory
is_in_default_directory.comment:
Boolean representing if this directory is the default one for your brand. 

The default directory will be the first directory listed in the dropdown menu in Qualtrics.

is_directory_deleted.name: is_directory_deleted
is_directory_deleted.comment: Boolean representing whether the record was soft-deleted in Qualtrics.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: qualtrics__daily_breakdown
metadata.comment: Daily breakdown of activities related to surveys and distribution in your Qualtrics instance.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The schema or database this record came from if you are making use of the qualtrics_union_schemas or qualtrics_union_databases variables, respectively. Empty string if you are not using either of these variables to union together multiple Qualtrics connectors.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Day of activity in your Qualtrics instance.

count_contacts_created.name: count_contacts_created
count_contacts_created.comment: New contacts created on this day.

count_contacts_unsubscribed_from_directo.name: count_contacts_unsubscribed_from_directory
count_contacts_unsubscribed_from_directo.comment: Count of contacts that unsubscribed from a directory.

count_contacts_unsubscribed_from_mailing.name: count_contacts_unsubscribed_from_mailing_list
count_contacts_unsubscribed_from_mailing.comment: Count of contacts that unsubscribed from a mailing list.

count_contacts_sent_surveys.name: count_contacts_sent_surveys
count_contacts_sent_surveys.comment: Count of unique contacts who have been sent surveys via the distribution.

count_contacts_opened_sent_surveys.name: count_contacts_opened_sent_surveys
count_contacts_opened_sent_surveys.comment: Count of contacts who opened a survey that was sent on this day.

count_contacts_started_sent_surveys.name: count_contacts_started_sent_surveys
count_contacts_started_sent_surveys.comment: Count of contacts who started a survey that was sent on this day.

count_contacts_completed_sent_surveys.name: count_contacts_completed_sent_surveys
count_contacts_completed_sent_surveys.comment: Count of contacts who completed a survey that was sent on this day.

count_distinct_surveys_responded_to.name: count_distinct_surveys_responded_to
count_distinct_surveys_responded_to.comment: Count of distinct survey templates (ie `survey_id`) that contacts responded to on this day.

total_count_survey_responses.name: total_count_survey_responses
total_count_survey_responses.comment: Count of distinct survey responses recorded on this day.

total_count_completed_survey_responses.name: total_count_completed_survey_responses
total_count_completed_survey_responses.comment: Count of distinct complete survey responses recorded on this day.

count_anonymous_survey_responses.name: count_anonymous_survey_responses
count_anonymous_survey_responses.comment: Number of recorded survey responses distributed anonymously.

count_anonymous_completed_survey_respons.name: count_anonymous_completed_survey_responses
count_anonymous_completed_survey_respons.comment: Number of _completed_ recorded survey responses distributed anonymously.

count_social_media_survey_responses.name: count_social_media_survey_responses
count_social_media_survey_responses.comment: Number of recorded survey responses distributed via [social media](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/social-media-distribution/).

count_social_media_completed_survey_resp.name: count_social_media_completed_survey_responses
count_social_media_completed_survey_resp.comment: Number of _completed_ survey responses distributed via [social media](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/social-media-distribution/).

count_personal_link_survey_responses.name: count_personal_link_survey_responses
count_personal_link_survey_responses.comment: Number of recorded survey responses distributed via [personal links](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/email-distribution/personal-links/).

count_personal_link_completed_survey_res.name: count_personal_link_completed_survey_responses
count_personal_link_completed_survey_res.comment: Number of _completed_ survey responses distributed via [personal links](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/email-distribution/personal-links/).

count_qr_code_survey_responses.name: count_qr_code_survey_responses
count_qr_code_survey_responses.comment: Number of recorded survey responses distributed via [QR codes](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/web-distribution/qr-code/).

count_qr_code_completed_survey_responses.name: count_qr_code_completed_survey_responses
count_qr_code_completed_survey_responses.comment: Number of _completed_ survey responses distributed via [QR codes](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/web-distribution/qr-code/).

count_email_survey_responses.name: count_email_survey_responses
count_email_survey_responses.comment: Number of recorded survey responses distributed via [email](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/email-distribution/emails-overview/).

count_email_completed_survey_responses.name: count_email_completed_survey_responses
count_email_completed_survey_responses.comment: Number of _completed_ survey responses distributed via [email](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/email-distribution/emails-overview/).

count_sms_survey_responses.name: count_sms_survey_responses
count_sms_survey_responses.comment: Number of recorded survey responses distributed via [SMS invite](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/mobile-distributions/sms-surveys/).

count_sms_completed_survey_responses.name: count_sms_completed_survey_responses
count_sms_completed_survey_responses.comment: Number of _completed_ survey responses distributed via [SMS invite](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/survey-platform/distributions-module/mobile-distributions/sms-surveys/).

count_uncategorized_survey_responses.name: count_uncategorized_survey_responses
count_uncategorized_survey_responses.comment: Number of recorded survey responses not distributed via the default channels.

count_uncategorized_completed_survey_res.name: count_uncategorized_completed_survey_responses
count_uncategorized_completed_survey_res.comment: Number of _completed_ survey responses not distributed via the default channels.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: qualtrics__directory
metadata.comment: A directory is an address book for the entire brand and contains all of the contacts that have been added by your users. This model provides a detailed view of each directory, enhanced with metrics regarding contacts, survey distribution, and engagement.

is_deduped_on_email.name: is_deduped_on_email
is_deduped_on_email.comment: Boolean representing if directory contacts are deduped based on email.

is_deduped_on_ext_ref.name: is_deduped_on_ext_ref
is_deduped_on_ext_ref.comment: Boolean representing if directory contacts are deduped based on an external data reference.

is_deduped_on_first_name.name: is_deduped_on_first_name
is_deduped_on_first_name.comment: Boolean representing if directory contacts are deduped based on first name.

is_deduped_on_last_name.name: is_deduped_on_last_name
is_deduped_on_last_name.comment: Boolean representing if directory contacts are deduped based on last name.

is_deduped_on_phone.name: is_deduped_on_phone
is_deduped_on_phone.comment: Boolean representing if directory contacts are deduped based on phone number.

directory_id.name: directory_id
directory_id.comment: The directory ID, also known as a pool ID. Example - POOL_012345678901234

is_default.name: is_default
is_default.comment:
Boolean representing if this directory is the default one for your brand. 

The default directory will be the first directory listed in the dropdown menu in Qualtrics.

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.comment: Boolean representing whether the record was soft-deleted in Qualtrics.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: The time when a record was last updated by Fivetran.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The schema or database this record came from if you are making use of the qualtrics_union_schemas or qualtrics_union_databases variables, respectively. Empty string if you are not using either of these variables to union together multiple Qualtrics connectors.

count_distinct_emails.name: count_distinct_emails
count_distinct_emails.comment: Count of distinct email addresses in the directory.

count_distinct_phones.name: count_distinct_phones
count_distinct_phones.comment: Count of distinct phone numbers (stripped of any non-numeric characters) in the directory.

total_count_unsubscribed_contacts.name: total_count_unsubscribed_contacts
total_count_unsubscribed_contacts.comment: Total number of contacts who have unsubscribed from the directory.

count_contacts_created_30d.name: count_contacts_created_30d
count_contacts_created_30d.comment: Number of contacts created in the last 30 days (inclusive) in this directory.

count_contacts_unsubscribed_30d.name: count_contacts_unsubscribed_30d
count_contacts_unsubscribed_30d.comment: Number of contacts who have opted out of receiving communications through this directory in the last 30 days (inclusive).

count_contacts_sent_survey_30d.name: count_contacts_sent_survey_30d
count_contacts_sent_survey_30d.comment: Number of contacts in this directory who have been sent a survey in the past 30 days (inclusive).

count_contacts_opened_survey_30d.name: count_contacts_opened_survey_30d
count_contacts_opened_survey_30d.comment: Number of contacts in this directory who have been sent a survey in the past 30 days (inclusive) and opened it.

count_contacts_started_survey_30d.name: count_contacts_started_survey_30d
count_contacts_started_survey_30d.comment: Number of contacts in this directory who have been sent a survey in the past 30 days (inclusive)and started it.

count_contacts_completed_survey_30d.name: count_contacts_completed_survey_30d
count_contacts_completed_survey_30d.comment: Number of contacts in this directory who have been sent a survey in the past 30 days (inclusive) and completed it.

count_surveys_sent_30d.name: count_surveys_sent_30d
count_surveys_sent_30d.comment: Number of _distinct_ surveys sent to contacts in the past 30 days (inclusive).

count_mailing_lists.name: count_mailing_lists
count_mailing_lists.comment: Number of mailing lists the exist within the directory.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: qualtrics__distribution
metadata.comment: Table of each survey's distribution (method of reaching out to XM directory contacts) enhanced with  survey response and status metrics.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The creation date and time of the record, expressed as an ISO 8601 value.

header_subject.name: header_subject
header_subject.comment: Email subject; text or message id (MS_).

message_id.name: message_id
message_id.comment: The ID for the desired library message.

message_text.name: message_text
message_text.comment: Text of the message to send.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The point in time when the record was last modified.

organization_id.name: organization_id
organization_id.comment: ID of the organization/brand this record belongs to.

owner_user_id.name: owner_user_id
owner_user_id.comment: The unique identifier for a specific user who owns this.

parent_distribution_id.name: parent_distribution_id
parent_distribution_id.comment: The unique ID of the parent distribution.

recipient_contact_id.name: recipient_contact_id
recipient_contact_id.comment: The contact ID of the recipient. Can point to `directory_contact` or `core_contact`.

recipient_mailing_list_id.name: recipient_mailing_list_id
recipient_mailing_list_id.comment: The mailing list or contact group associated with the distribution(s). Can point to `directory_mailing_list` or `core_mailing_list`.

recipient_sample_id.name: recipient_sample_id
recipient_sample_id.comment: The ID for the desired sample. Can point to `directory_sample` or `core_sample` (not included in package).

request_status.name: request_status
request_status.comment: The distribution's status. States include `Pending` and `Done`. The Pending state is for email that is scheduled to be sent at a later time.

request_type.name: request_type
request_type.comment: The distribution's type. Types include `Invite`, `Reminder`, and `ThankYou`.

send_at.name: send_at
send_at.comment: The date and time the request will be or was sent (in ISO 8601 format). Note that this date and time could be in the future if the email distribution is scheduled to send after a delay.

survey_link_expires_at.name: survey_link_expires_at
survey_link_expires_at.comment: The expiration date for the link associated with the survey distribution. Null if `request_type` != `Invite`.

survey_link_type.name: survey_link_type
survey_link_type.comment: The link type (`Individual`, `Anonymous`, or `Multiple`) for the link associated with the survey distribution. Null if `request_type` != `Invite`.

survey_id.name: survey_id
survey_id.comment: The unique survey ID. Will be non-null even if `request_type` != `Invite`.

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.comment: Boolean representing whether the record was soft-deleted in Qualtrics.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: The time when a record was last updated by Fivetran.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The schema or database this record came from if you are making use of the qualtrics_union_schemas or qualtrics_union_databases variables, respectively. Empty string if you are not using either of these variables to union together multiple Qualtrics connectors.

parent_distribution_header_subject.name: parent_distribution_header_subject
parent_distribution_header_subject.comment: Email subject; text or message id (MS_) of the parent distribution.

recipient_mailing_list_name.name: recipient_mailing_list_name
recipient_mailing_list_name.comment: Name of the mailing list associated with the distribution(s).

owner_email.name: owner_email
owner_email.comment: Email of the `USER` who owns the object.

owner_first_name.name: owner_first_name
owner_first_name.comment: First name of the `user` who owns the object.

owner_last_name.name: owner_last_name
owner_last_name.comment: Surname of the `user` who owns the object.

current_count_surveys_pending.name: current_count_surveys_pending
current_count_surveys_pending.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently pending (the distribution is scheduled but has yet to be sent).

current_count_surveys_success.name: current_count_surveys_success
current_count_surveys_success.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `success` (the distribution was successfully delivered to the contact).

current_count_surveys_error.name: current_count_surveys_error
current_count_surveys_error.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `error` (an error occurred while attempting to send the distribution).

current_count_surveys_opened.name: current_count_surveys_opened
current_count_surveys_opened.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `opened` (the distribution was opened by the contact).

current_count_surveys_complaint.name: current_count_surveys_complaint
current_count_surveys_complaint.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `complaint` (the contact complained that the distribution was spam).

current_count_surveys_skipped.name: current_count_surveys_skipped
current_count_surveys_skipped.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `skipped` (the contact was skipped due to contact frequency rules or blacklisted contact information).

current_count_surveys_blocked.name: current_count_surveys_blocked
current_count_surveys_blocked.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `blocked` (the distribution failed to send, because the contact blocked it or the email was caught by the spam circuit breaker).

current_count_surveys_failure.name: current_count_surveys_failure
current_count_surveys_failure.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `failed` (the distribution failed to be delivered).

current_count_surveys_unknown.name: current_count_surveys_unknown
current_count_surveys_unknown.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `unknown` (the distribution failed for an unknown reason).

current_count_surveys_softbounce.name: current_count_surveys_softbounce
current_count_surveys_softbounce.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `softbounce` (the distribution bounced but can be retried).

current_count_surveys_hardbounce.name: current_count_surveys_hardbounce
current_count_surveys_hardbounce.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `hardbounce` (the distribution bounced and should not be retried).

current_count_surveys_surveystarted.name: current_count_surveys_surveystarted
current_count_surveys_surveystarted.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `surveystarted` (the contact started the survey distributed).

current_count_surveys_surveypartiallyfin.name: current_count_surveys_surveypartiallyfinished
current_count_surveys_surveypartiallyfin.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `surveypartiallyfinished` (the contact submitted a partially completed survey response).

current_count_surveys_surveyfinished.name: current_count_surveys_surveyfinished
current_count_surveys_surveyfinished.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `surveyfinished` (the contact submitted a completed survey response).

current_count_surveys_surveyscreenedout.name: current_count_surveys_surveyscreenedout
current_count_surveys_surveyscreenedout.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `surveyscreenedout` (the contact screened out while taking the survey).

current_count_surveys_sessionexpired.name: current_count_surveys_sessionexpired
current_count_surveys_sessionexpired.comment: Count of distributed surveys currently with a status of `sessionexpired` (the contact's survey session has expired).

count_contacts_sent_surveys.name: count_contacts_sent_surveys
count_contacts_sent_surveys.comment: Count of unique contacts who have been sent surveys via the distribution.

count_contacts_opened_surveys.name: count_contacts_opened_surveys
count_contacts_opened_surveys.comment: Count of unique contacts who have opened surveys via the distribution.

count_contacts_started_surveys.name: count_contacts_started_surveys
count_contacts_started_surveys.comment: Count of unique contacts who have started surveys via the distribution.

count_contacts_completed_surveys.name: count_contacts_completed_surveys
count_contacts_completed_surveys.comment: Count of unique contacts who have completed surveys via the distribution.

first_survey_sent_at.name: first_survey_sent_at
first_survey_sent_at.comment: Timestamp of when the first survey was sent via this distribution.

last_survey_sent_at.name: last_survey_sent_at
last_survey_sent_at.comment: Timestamp of when a survey was most recently sent out via this distribution.

first_survey_opened_at.name: first_survey_opened_at
first_survey_opened_at.comment: Timestamp of when the first survey was opened via this distribution.

last_survey_opened_at.name: last_survey_opened_at
last_survey_opened_at.comment: Timestamp of when a survey was most recently opened via this distribution.

first_response_completed_at.name: first_response_completed_at
first_response_completed_at.comment: Timestamp of when the first survey was completed via this distribution.

last_response_completed_at.name: last_response_completed_at
last_response_completed_at.comment: Timestamp of when a survey was most recently completed via this distribution.

avg_time_to_open_in_seconds.name: avg_time_to_open_in_seconds
avg_time_to_open_in_seconds.comment: Average time difference between when a survey was sent and when it was opened.

avg_time_to_start_in_seconds.name: avg_time_to_start_in_seconds
avg_time_to_start_in_seconds.comment: Average time difference between when a survey was **sent** and when it was started.

avg_time_to_complete_in_seconds.name: avg_time_to_complete_in_seconds
avg_time_to_complete_in_seconds.comment: Average time difference between when a survey was **sent** and when it was completed.

median_time_to_open_in_seconds.name: median_time_to_open_in_seconds
median_time_to_open_in_seconds.comment: Median time difference between when a survey was sent and when it was opened.

median_time_to_start_in_seconds.name: median_time_to_start_in_seconds
median_time_to_start_in_seconds.comment: Median time difference between when a survey was **sent** and when it was started.

median_time_to_complete_in_seconds.name: median_time_to_complete_in_seconds
